spans: Section 2.1 for general two-country model structure
Section 2.2 for final-good production and CES indexes, equations 1-6
Section 2.3 for intermediate demand and distribution sector, equations 7-10
Section 2.4 for intermediate supply and raw-material technologies, equations 11-16 and 22-24
Section 2.5 for Rotemberg price setting and flexible-price markup limits, equations 17-21
Section 2.7 for household preferences, budget constraint, UIP, capital accumulation, and wage adjustment, equations 25-36
Section 2.8 for government budget and monetary rule, equations 37-38
Section 3.2-3.3 for stochastic process form and baseline calibration

formula_quality.summary: Core equation blocks are present in Markdown, but several equations need source-level review due to OCR damage or because the paper states FOCs in prose rather than printing complete equilibrium conditions.

runtime_validation.notes: Current phase is private derivation extraction only.
